pqroblox-form-code-help: Use the code shown in Pixel Quest after running the in-game /wikicode command.
pqroblox-wiki-success: Your wiki account is now linked to Pixel Quest account ID '''$1'''.
pqroblox-wiki-current-link: This wiki account is linked to Pixel Quest account ID '''$1'''.
pqroblox-wiki-error-invalid-code: That wiki code is not valid. Request a new code in the game.
pqroblox-wiki-error-expired-code: That wiki code has expired. Request a new code in the game.
pqroblox-wiki-error-roblox-already-linke: That Roblox account is already linked to a wiki user. Unlink it on the wiki first.
pqroblox-wiki-error-wiki-already-linked: Your wiki account is already linked to a Roblox user. Unlink first to use a new code.
pqroblox-api-error-no-secret: The wiki is not configured for game server API access (missing PQ_API_SECRET / DATADUMP_INGEST_SECRET).
pqroblox-api-error-roblox-already-linked: That Roblox account is already linked. Unlink on the wiki before requesting a new code.
pqroblox-api-error-code-generation: Could not generate a unique link code. Try again.
pqroblox-pref-valor: Who can see account Valor (root save field)
pqroblox-pref-valor-help: Choose who can see your account Valor next to your Roblox profile link at the top of the profile (not a separate tab).
pqroblox-pref-last-seen-help: Choose whether others can see when you were last seen (from save data).
pqroblox-pref-characters-help: Shows your living characters (name, skin, experience, age).
pqroblox-pref-characters-detail: Who can see character equipment & stats
pqroblox-pref-characters-detail-help: Shows equipped items and stat block for each character (requires characters).
pqroblox-pref-characters-inventory-help: Shows per-character inventory slots (private by default).
pqroblox-pref-skins: Who can see skin collection grid
pqroblox-pref-skins-help: Shows owned vs locked skins from the wiki skin list.
pqroblox-pref-badges: Who can see badge collection & equipped badge
pqroblox-pref-badges-help: Shows the badge grid and the badge icon next to each character name (when characters are visible).
pqroblox-pref-honor: Who can see honor (rank icon + value)
pqroblox-pref-honor-help: Honor is estimated from completed HonorBoost achievements. Shown next to character names when visible.
pqroblox-pref-vault-help: Shows vault slots for trading reference (private by default).
pqroblox-pref-account-stats-help: Shows tracked account statistics from AccountStats/progressTrackers.
pqroblox-profile-nodata: Could not load save data from Roblox DataStore (missing entry, API error, or wiki not configured).
pqroblox-profile-not-linked: User "$1" has not linked a Pixel Quest account.
pqroblox-profile-not-found-roblox: Profile not found (no such Roblox user or not indexed yet).
pqroblox-profile-prefs-hint: Control what others see in [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-pqroblox|Preferences → Pixel Quest Profile]].
pqroblox-profile-no-datadump-skins: Mount or configure pq-datadump.json (PQ_DATADUMP_PATH) to show the full skin grid.
pqroblox-profile-no-datadump-badges: Mount or configure pq-datadump.json (PQ_DATADUMP_PATH) to show the full badge grid.
pqroblox-profiles-intro: Wiki accounts with a linked Roblox id (Pixel Quest extension).
pqroblox-userpage-preview-open: Open full Pixel Quest profile page
